tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Dolphins are widely regarded 1.1. _________ some of the most remarkable creatures in the ocean. They belong to a group of marine mammals known as cetaceans, which also 1.2. _________ whales and porpoises. Living in tightly bonded social groups called pods, dolphins rely on a sophisticated system of clicks and whistles to communicate with one 1.3. _________. Researchers have even suggested that individual dolphins may have signature whistles that function 1.4. _________ names.

One of the most fascinating aspects of dolphin behaviour is their intelligence. They have been observed using sea sponges as tools to protect their snouts while foraging on the ocean 1.5. _________, a skill that mothers pass 1.6. _________ to their young. Furthermore, dolphins display a strong sense of 1.7. _________, often coming to the aid of injured companions or even stranded humans.

1.8. _________ their apparent resilience, dolphin populations face serious threats from pollution, fishing nets, and habitat 1.9. _________. Conservation efforts are under way in many parts of the world, but scientists warn that 1.10. _________ more is done to address these dangers, several species could decline significantly within the coming decades.
